message:
Add comptime constants to code generator

Added comptime constants for zero runtime cost:

Generator comptime constants:
- BUILD_DIR = ".build"
- MODULE_EXT = ".zig"
- IMPORT_PREFIX = "./"
- MAIN_NAME = "__main__"

Benefits:
- String concatenation at compile time
- No runtime string operations
- Compiler optimizes away constants
- Better code readability
- Consistent paths throughout codebase

All path generation now uses comptime string concat:
- IMPORT_PREFIX ++ "{s}" ++ MODULE_EXT
- BUILD_DIR ++ "/{s}" ++ MODULE_EXT

Zero runtime overhead!
